title: Rain, rain… coming again
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Much-welcomed rain that started in the early hours on Thursday 15 January has brought slight relief to Plettenberg Bay - a day after Level 4 water restrictions were imposed in Bitou.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Much-welcomed rain that started in the early hours on Thursday 15 January has brought slight relief to Plettenberg Bay - a day after Level 4 water restrictions were imposed in Bitou."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Plett Central recorded a rainfall of 30,5mm over a 12-hour period, while other measurements along the N2 in Ferdinand Street recorded 50mm."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In Nature’s Valley, 52,5mm was recorded in a 24-hour period.","html":"In Nature’s Valley, 52,5mm was recorded in a 24-hour period."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Rainfall in the Keurbooms catchment area was also promising.","html":"Rainfall in the Keurbooms catchment area was also promising."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A notice posted today said the Keurbooms North wildfire has been declared inactive and firefighting resources have been scaled down following the 35mm of rainfall.","html":"A notice posted today said the Keurbooms North wildfire has been declared inactive and firefighting resources have been scaled down following the 35mm of rainfall."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We extend a sincere thank you to the Plett community for their generous contributions and donations of supplies for the firefighters, as well as the Beacon Island KwikSPAR for facilitating the collection,” read the notice.","html":"“We extend a sincere thank you to the Plett community for their generous contributions and donations of supplies for the firefighters, as well as the Beacon Island KwikSPAR for facilitating the collection,” read the notice."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Donations have been distributed to the WoF, SANParks, MTO, SCFPA and Bitou Fire crews. No more donations are required.”","html":"\"Donations have been distributed to the WoF, SANParks, MTO, SCFPA and Bitou Fire crews. No more donations are required.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The rain falling towards Wittedrift. Rainfall of 50mm was measured in the area towards Plettenberg Bay. Photo: Chris van Gass","html":"The rain falling towards Wittedrift. Rainfall of 50mm was measured in the area towards Plettenberg Bay. Photo: Chris van Gass"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A screenshot of the Windy.com web page.","html":"A screenshot of the Windy.com web page."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
